title: perula retusa
intro: Perula retusa, also known as the "Peruvian tea", is a plant native to the Andean region of South America, belonging to the family Boraginaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Perula retusa include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function, making it a popular choice for herbal remedies. Perula retusa can be prepared as a tea by infusing the leaves in hot water, or as a tincture by mixing the plant extracts with a solvent like ethanol or glycerin.
